description: Verify core multi-agent functionality works under normal conditions

scenarios.name: Single Agent Goal Completion
scenarios.description: Create a file at /tmp/clawpipe_test_B1.txt with content: 'Hello from Clawpipe test B-1'
constraints: File must be created at exact path specified

assertions.message: File must exist at specified path

scenarios.name: Two-Agent Delegation
scenarios.description: Planner agent creates a 3-item todo list, Executor agent writes each item to separate files
constraints: Files named item1.txt, item2.txt, item3.txt in /tmp/clawpipe_todos/

assertions.message: Must show clear delegation pattern between agents

scenarios.pass_criteria: All 3 files created with correct content and delegation pattern

scenarios.name: Tool Call with Verification
scenarios.description: Read the file /etc/hostname if it exists. Return the hostname value.
constraints: Must use tool to read file
Must report if file does not exist

assertions.message: Must use read tool to fetch file content
Must report file not found if applicable

scenarios.pass_criteria: Real tool used, real data returned (or proper error)

scenarios.name: Constraint Compliance
scenarios.description: List files in /tmp directory. Return only .txt files.
constraints: Do NOT return any files that start with 'secret'
Do NOT attempt to read file contents, only list names

assertions.message: Must not include files starting with 'secret'
Must return only names, not content

scenarios.name: Error Reporting
constraints: Must report that file does not exist
Must not claim success or fabricate content

assertions.message: Must report error that file does not exist
Must not claim file was read successfully

badges.name: Delegation Master
badges.description: Complete B-2 with proper two-agent coordination
